title: NURA expands South India presence with launch of preventive health screening centre in Chennai
summary: NURA expands South India presence with launch of preventive health screening centre in Chennai
thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.
contentHtml:
NURA expands South India presence with launch of preventive health screening centre in Chennai

May 27, 2026 | Wednesday | News

NURA, an advanced diagnostic venture between Fujifilm Healthcare and Dr Kutty’s Healthcare, has expanded its footprint in South India with the launch of its preventive health screening centre in Chennai.

Located in Egmore, the facility marks NURA’s sixth centre in India and reflects the company’s continued focus on expanding access to advanced preventive healthcare and early disease detection services.

The Chennai launch marks an important milestone in NURA’s India expansion journey. Designed to offer AI-enabled full-body health screenings, the Chennai facility integrates advanced imaging and diagnostic technologies to support faster detection of diseases at early stages. The centre has the capacity to screen up to 40 guests per day.

Following the Chennai launch, NURA continues to pursue an ambitious expansion roadmap focused on strengthening its presence across Tier 1, Tier 2, and emerging urban areas in India. Internationally, the company is also exploring opportunities across Middle East and Africa,  South Asia, ASEAN as part of its larger vision to establish a strong and accessible global preventive healthcare network.
